state.next-action:
Session 2026-04-16d in progress. TRACK 1 partial: nav-shared + PlayableTeaser vocabulary rebrand (eval→generation/species/spawn) + pre-existing TS fix (EvalProjectMeta.published optional). Build passes. 3 new todos captured: site-article-parallel-subagent-cost, structural-parallelism-task-outbox, lightweight-agent-and-scoped-snapshot.
REMAINING — still planned:
TRACK 1 (site rebrand) — continue: rest of /downloads, /quickstart, /how-it-works, /project-market, templates/*, playable/* descriptions still have "eval" copy. Task 45-15 (vocabulary audit) is the umbrella.
TRACK 2 (VCS portability): Run `gad spawn escape-the-dungeon/vcs-test`. Compare bare data-attributes vs React component. Iterate VCS skill. STOP after: one generation complete + skill iterated.
TRACK 3 (breed command + formula): Implement `gad breed`. Refine pressure formula display on /how-it-works.
STRUCTURAL INVESTIGATIONS (not decided, captured as todos): - Per-agent task outbox pattern — avoid shared-file merge conflicts (structural-parallelism-task-outbox) - Scoped snapshot + lightweight agent profile — drop subagent cold-start cost (lightweight-agent-and-scoped-snapshot) - Landing-site article on parallel-subagent cost (site-article-parallel-subagent-cost)
